name: Casper Original Hybrid Mattress
introText: The Casper Original Hybrid combines foam comfort layers with pocketed springs, delivering the brand recognition and balanced feel that made Casper Canada's most recognized mattress brand at $1,299 CAD (Queen).
whatWorks: Zoned support system with firmer coils under hips — Casper's zoned design relieves shoulder pressure for side sleepers while supporting the lower back more than a uniform-tension mattress.
Well-balanced feel suits most sleep positions — the medium firmness and hybrid construction work for side, back, and combination sleepers.
worthKnowing: Priced above comparable Canadian alternatives — the Endy Hybrid is $1,175 and performs similarly; Casper charges a premium for brand recognition.
Available at Canadian retailers like Sleep Country — can be tested in person, which is an advantage over D2C Canadian brands.

commonComplaints.title: Priced higher than comparable alternatives
commonComplaints.body: The Casper Original Hybrid costs more than the Endy Hybrid for similar performance. You're partly paying for the brand.

commonComplaints.title: Edge support is soft
commonComplaints.body: The perimeter of the Casper compresses more than expected for a hybrid. Not as firm at the edge as traditional innerspring alternatives.

commonComplaints.title: Motion transfer noticeable
commonComplaints.body: The pocketed coils reduce but don't eliminate motion transfer. Light sleepers with active partners may want an all-foam alternative.

verdict: The Casper Original Hybrid is a quality mattress with balanced feel and zoned support — but it's not the best value in its category. The Endy Hybrid performs comparably at $124 less. Choose the Casper if you want to test it in-store at Sleep Country or prefer the brand.

realBuyers.quote: Comfortable from night one. The zoned support actually feels different — less pressure on my shoulder.
Could try it at Sleep Country before buying. That's why I chose Casper over Endy.
Good mattress but overpriced. The Endy Hybrid is just as good for less.

metaDescription: Casper Original Hybrid Mattress review Canada: foam + coils, medium, 100-night trial. $1,299 CAD (Queen). Best-known hybrid mattress brand in Canada.
